session_focus: Make canonical sync the only authority that can create, retire, or advance TASK.md.
user_directives: Make canonical sync the only authority that can create, retire, or advance TASK.md.
assistant_responses: Removed the duplicate promotion path from the loop so canonical sync alone governs task-file lifecycle.
training_value: One control path for task promotion prevents stale task resurrection.
TASK.md kept reappearing because loop.py and dashboard_state.py both had power to write it from different task views.
